comments.author: @WorldsinStone
comments.text: The Kyrgyz nomads have survived for centuries without owning the land — their freedom comes from having no roots. The monks of Meteora did the opposite: they climbed so high that the world could no longer reach them. Two peoples, two completely different answers to the same question. Which one makes more sense to you? Watch Meteora and discover how the monks lived above the clouds: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dySmlM1atQQ
